catalog_content:
Item Name: Sugar Free Mango Peach, Diabetic & Keto Friendly Frozen Slushy Cocktail Mix - Vodka, Rum, Wine, Tequila, Non-Alcoholic
Bullet Point 1: DIABETIC AND KETO FRIENDLY: 2 Friends & A Blender uses Trivia to sweeten our sugar free slushy flavor packets. It’s a natural sweetener that won’t raise your blood sugar level and is perfect for those living a keto lifestyle.
Bullet Point 2: REFRESHING AND DELITIOUS: Each flavor packet can be made with vodka, wine, or rum. We even include non-alcoholic directions right on the label so everyone can enjoy it, even the kids. Each flavor packet is filled individually to ensure the quality and consistency of each packet
Bullet Point 3: PERFECT FOR ENTERTAINING: Great for serving at backyard BBQs, holidays, girls’ night, special events or any time you have a get together! Each flavor packet makes 48oz. Any leftover slushy can be put in a plastic bag and put in the freezer to enjoy another day
Bullet Point 4: GREAT FOR THE WHOLE FAMILY: When serving for a big group we suggest making it all non-alcoholic and have different flavored vodkas and rums on the side. Those that want the alcohol can put a shot in their glass. That way adults and kids alike can enjoy it.
Bullet Point 5: SLUSHY PACKETS MAKE GREAT GIFTS: Our packets are so versatile they are the perfect gift not only for adults. But for the kids too. For a child’s birthday just put a few flavor packets in a basket with some microwave popcorn and a few treats for the perfect movie night present.
Product Description: 2 Friends & A Blender manufactures, from a state licensed kitchen, a dry tropical slushy flavored mix. Just add the flavor packet to a blender along with 6 cups of ice and the liquid ingredients to make a fun tropical frozen drink! Each flavor packets can be made with vodka, wine, rum or kept non-alcoholic. Any leftover slushy can be placed in a plastic bag and put in the freezer to enjoy on another day. Our sugar free slushy line is sweetened with Trivia. It’s a natural sweetener that won’t raise your blood sugar level and is perfect for those living a keto lifestyle.
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
product_name: Sugar Free Mango Peach Frozen Slushy Cocktail Mix
overall_summary: Sugar-free, keto-friendly slushy mix positioned for health-conscious consumers. Uses natural sweetener and offers versatile alcohol/non-alcohol options, appealing to families and event hosts. Standard plastic pouch packaging with no premium indicators suggests mid-range pricing. Value per packet and bulk serving potential may justify cost.

Item Name: Shan Mutton Roast Recipe and Seasoning Mix 1.76 oz (50g) - Spice Powder for Mutton Roast with Mild Condiments - Suitable for Vegetarians - Airtight Bag in a Box (Pack of 2) Bullet Point 1: Quantity- Shan Mutton Roast comes packaged and sealed in a box containing a packet of 1.76oz of spices Bullet Point 2: Easy to use- All the ingredients and instructions are given at the back of the box. Bullet Point 3: Easy to prepare- Now you don’t need to gather a variety of different masalas to make Mutton Roast, just use this seasoning and herbs mix and you are good to go Bullet Point 4: All Shan products are carefully packaged under the most hygienic conditions according to international quality standard Bullet Point 5: 50g Serving Suggestion Product Description:

Shan Foods was a small company established in 1981. Soon it gained popularity and now we have a presence in 65 countries across 5 continents. All our products are carefully packaged under the most hygienic conditions according to international quality standard. All products of Shan Foods are ISO 9001:2015.

Shan Foods is committed to make your life easy in the kitchen and at the same time delighting your taste buds. We are the pioneer of ready to make masala packets. We are continuously working hard to ensure you can serve authentic Pakistani/Indian food to your loved ones. Each recipe is tailored to ensure a delicious taste through our special herbs seasoning and spices. 

Barbeque meat is the most delicious of all but the ingredients vary from person to person and can be hit or miss. Shan Foods brings you Shan Mutton Roast recipe and seasoning mix. This is a seasoning mix made exclusively for barbeque blend. The final product is deliciously soft and moist finger licking.


Shan Mutton Roast Masalahelps you recreate the authentic Mutton Roast at home
